## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run lint`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`
- [ ] `pnpm run pack:dry-run`
- [ ] `node dist/cli/main.js check --json --root .`

## Context hygiene

- [ ] Dogfooded Dr. Context on this repository; self-scan has zero findings or explicitly accepted findings.
- [ ] Updated fixtures for scanner behavior changes.
- [ ] Findings include source-backed evidence and suggestions.
- [ ] No secrets, logs, caches, or local-only artifacts added.
